description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CodeQL that analyzes C++ code. The workflow should trigger on push events to the master branch for .cpp and .h files, on pull requests to the master branch for .cpp and .h files, and on a scheduled basis every Tuesday at 22:00. In an ubuntu-latest job, checkout the repository with a fetch depth of 2, and if the event is a pull request, checkout the head of the pull request. Initialize CodeQL for C++ analysis, install dependencies, set up Qbs, build the project, and then perform a CodeQL analysis.
